pins.name: V IN
pins.notes: May be between 2.7V and 5V; bypass with a ≥3.3µF low ESR capacitor as close as possible to the pin for best performance.

pins.name: GND
pins.notes: Should be tied to a ground plane for best performance.

pins.name: V OUT
pins.notes: V OUT should be bypassed with a ≥3.3µF low ESR capacitor as close as possible to the pin for best performance.

pins.name: C1 +
pins.function_short: Charge pump flying capacitor positive terminal

pins.name: C1 –
pins.function_short: Charge pump flying capacitor negative terminal
